{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220513101D6ACECAC1E267195AE7"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7549376421188731673","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"偏理论，理想化，和游戏一样做任务。建议后续可以，拍视频和直播。还可以，挺好看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1757729678,"group_id":"7542024925985393726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"......","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N81yhhDlGDJFW01IZI+i3+IdYjMDIk3CQXkKjPJtZT59","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7b939740f4e44b08b1bc4ff98529119a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710180&x-signature=bzH%2BfxQL1sNuh17gnoI%2F1KVUJhs%3D","user_id":"3751997413523949","user_name":"GaoGao..."},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3751997413523949","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1719768062,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7542024925985393726","book_info":{"abstract":"【轻松日常】【爆护爽文】【职业钓鱼】【全国游钓】【团队成长】【单女主】
林凡的人生，在拿起那根神秘竹竿之前，黯淡无光。 007福报？月薪三千？主管PUA？——“这破逼班谁爱加谁加，老子不伺候了！”

一次水库边的偶遇，他捡起了一根看似平凡的竹竿。 却没想到，这一竿甩出去，竟彻底钓翻了他的命运！

从此，水库是他的金库，江河是他的钱袋，大海是他的后花园！ 野生巨鲤？爆护！罕见鳜鱼？连杆！ 深海巨物？通通拿下！

技能？ 顶级大师主动点拨，倾囊相授！ 队友？失意壮汉忠心追随，水产学霸女神组团加盟！ 生活？昔日嘲笑的亲友目瞪口呆，父母愁容变笑颜！

但林凡发现，最大的收获并非滚滚财源—— 是搏击风浪时的热血沸腾，是兄弟并肩的酣畅淋漓，是见证祖国壮丽山河的震撼，更是那平凡生活中，一竿一线钓起的人生百味。

这是一条从“空军小白”到“钓界传说”的逆袭之路！ 这是一个充满鱼腥味、钞票味、友情味和人生味的爽快故事！

且看林凡如何凭一根神竿，钓出人生万里山河！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob1daa95de5bc469b526977de3c8f28fe~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"腼腆的小张","author_id":"","book_id":"7542024925985393726","book_name":"游钓全国，从一根竹竿开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7542024933570331198","read_count":"28","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"471946"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"219","tags":"都市日常,都市,系统,单女主,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ob1daa95de5bc469b526977de3c8f28fe~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779311590&x-signature=uQICzo7S0%2F6OYWBQW54CGqCpAYU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2145854331816048","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"47"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220513101D6ACECAC1E267195AE7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读42分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2493,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":547},"user_action":{"author":0,
